name: my-skills-collection
description: SUEYTAME's personal collection of 119 AI skills across engineering, product management, frontend design, decision-making, and more.

plugins.name: engineering-lifecycle
plugins.description: 24 software-engineering lifecycle skills (spec, plan, build, test, review, ship) from addyosmani/agent-skills.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: 68 product-management skills (discovery, strategy, execution, GTM, research, growth, analytics) from phuryn/pm-skills.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: 13 anti-slop frontend design + image-generation skills from Leonxlnx/taste-skill.

plugins.name: sparc-and-extras
plugins.description: 12 standalone-safe skills including the SPARC methodology, from ruvnet/ruflo.

plugins.name: decision-tools
plugins.description: LLM Council - run any decision through 5 advisors who peer-review and synthesize a verdict.

plugins.name: openhuman-shipping
plugins.description: ship-and-babysit PR shipping workflow skill from tinyhumansai/openhuman.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: 14 software-development methodology skills (brainstorming, TDD, systematic debugging, subagent-driven development, writing plans/skills) from obra/superpowers.
